name: sommelier
description: Verification-gated orchestration skills — turn a big task into a PRD + file-scoped parallel tickets, pair each with the cheapest model tier that passes, and gate merges on re-measured evidence. Self-tested across six rounds, every round published: the verification rule (digest) beats a placebo at catching certified bugs (0%->44% (sonnet) / 29% (haiku), hidden-tests, sonnet p~6e-8), tier-routing runs ~19% cheaper than an all-Opus workflow, parallel fan-out is ~1.75x slower (single run) on small tasks, and Round 6's shipped-text probe nulled at the ceiling (published; 0/200 negative controls broken).
